mapper.select: SELECT id, itinerary_id, time, description, sort_order, created_at FROM domestic_itinerary_schedules WHERE itinerary_id = #{itineraryId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO domestic_itinerary_schedules (itinerary_id, time, description, sort_order, created_at) VALUES (#{itineraryId}, #{time}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, NOW())
